name: 9 Iron
about: Nine Iron offers virtual golf experiences using advanced Golfzon Technology in a warm, welcoming environment. The facility provides three bays for virtual golfing, suitable for events, small gatherings, date nights, or solo practice sessions. Players can access world-renowned golf courses with immersive technology that tracks ball movement and provides statistical feedback to help improve their game. Virtual golf offers year-round play regardless of weather, with affordable pricing and convenience compared to traditional golf courses.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Golfzon Technology creates an immersive experience with world-renowned courses
Year-round access regardless of weather conditions
Statistical tracking helps golfers improve their skills over time
Convenient and affordable alternative to traditional golf courses
Flexible booking options for various group sizes and occasions

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of alcohol service on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art Golfzon Technology used for virtual golf experience

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify whether clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has kitchen facilities available for food service, but no mention is made of outside food or drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify average time for 18 holes, but booking is done by the hour for bay rental.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as having something for everyone and mentions events, suggesting it welcomes families.
